issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as database connection failures or invalid input.
Skill assumes Node.js 18+ with PostgreSQL and Redis, limiting applicability to other environments.

scenarios.name: Storefront Stripe checkout flow
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents endpoint paths (/checkout, /order) and typically skips the payment-sessions init step; treatment chains POST /store/carts, /line-items, /shipping-methods, /payment-sessions, /complete in the exact order documented and passes region_id when creating the cart.

scenarios.name: Order confirmation email on order.placed
scenarios.rationale: Baseline puts the email send inline in an order route or proposes a Stripe webhook; treatment creates src/subscribers/order-placed.ts exporting a handler and config with event: 'order.placed' and resolves the notification service from container as shown in the SKILL.md.
